Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class CommunitiesSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MetadataForSettings
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.CommunitiesSettings
public class CommunitiesSettings extends MetadataForSettings

Java class for CommunitiesSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="CommunitiesSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}MetadataForSettings">
       <sequence>
         <element name="applyLoginPageTypeToEmbeddedLogin" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="blockEmbeddedLoginUnknownURLRedirect" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="canModerateAllFeedPosts" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="canModerateInternalFeedPosts" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="embeddedVisualforcePages" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCommunityWorkspaces" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCspContactVisibilityPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCspNotesOnAccConPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEnablePRM" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableExternalAccHierPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableGuestPermDisOptOutCruc" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableGuestRecordReassignOrgPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableGuestSecurityOptOutCruc" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableGuvSecurityOptOutPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableInviteChatterGuestEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableNameFieldsUserPIIEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableNetPortalUserReportOpts" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableNetworksEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableOotbProfExtUserOpsEnable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enablePRMAccRelPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enablePowerCustomerCaseStatus" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enablePreventBadgeGuestAccess" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableRelaxPartnerAccountFieldPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableUnsupportedBrowserModalPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableUsernameUniqForOrgPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
